    DIM_STATE.STATE_NAME,
    COUNT(DIM_DISTRICT.DISTRICT_ID) AS DISTRICT_COUNT
FROM 
    DIM_STATE
LEFT JOIN 
    DIM_DISTRICT ON DIM_STATE.STATE_ID = DIM_DISTRICT.STATE_ID
WHERE 
    DIM_STATE.STATE_NAME IN ('Andhra Pradesh', 'Arunachal Pradesh')
GROUP BY 
    DIM_STATE.STATE_NAME
HAVING 
    COUNT(DIM_DISTRICT.DISTRICT_ID) >= 1;

    DIM_STATE.STATE_NAME,

question: India ke top 5 districts ke district names aur total number of child welfare centres list karo, child welfare centres ke sum ke descending order mein.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T5 ON T4.COUNTRY_ID = T5.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T5.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmcc.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) as TOTAL_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dsd ON dd.DISTRICT_ID = dsd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmcc ON dsd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmcc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE dc.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY dd.DISTRICT_ID, dd.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmcc.NUMBER_OF_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) as TOTAL_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES
FROM DIM_DISTRICT dd
JOIN DIM_STATE ds ON dd.STATE_ID = ds.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_COUNTRY dc ON ds.COUNTRY_ID = dc.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dsd ON dd.DISTRICT_ID = dsd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmcc ON dsd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmcc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE dc.COUNTRY_NAME ILIKE 'India'
GROUP BY dd.DISTRICT_ID, dd.DISTRICT_NAME

predicted_sql: SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) AS TOTAL_RURAL_POPULATION, SUM(fp.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) AS TOTAL_SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION FROM DIM_DISTRICT d JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION fp ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fp.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) > 1109.000 ORDER BY SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC;
raw_output: SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) AS TOTAL_RURAL_POPULATION, SUM(fp.SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION) AS TOTAL_SCHEDULED_TRIBES_RURAL_POPULATION FROM DIM_DISTRICT d JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION fp ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fp.SUB_DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) > 1109.000 ORDER BY SUM(fp.RURAL_POPULATION) DESC;

gold_sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID WHERE T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Diglipur', 'Mayabunder', 'Ferrargunj', 'Great Nicobar', 'Rangat') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME,
    dim_district.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fact_financial_services.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) AS total_agricultural_credit_societies
FROM FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ON FACT_FINANCIAL_SERVICES.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = DIM_SUB_DISTRICT.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT ON DIM_SUB_DISTRICT.DISTRICT_ID = DIM_DISTRICT.DISTRICT_ID
WHERE dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Diglipur'
   OR dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Mayabunder'
   OR dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Ferrargunj'
   OR dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Great Nicobar'
   OR dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Rangat'
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dim_district.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY SUM(fact_financial_services.NUMBER_OF_AGRICULTURAL_CREDIT_SOCIETIES) DESC;
